news.headline: BiltOn secures $15M Series B funding, rebrands from Beti to enhance construction ops software, reduce insurance claims.
news.summary: A prominent construction operations and risk management software company, BiltOn, based in New York, recently revealed its significant expansion on a national scale. The company raised an impressive $15 million in a Series B funding round. In addition to this financial success, BiltOn also unveiled a revamped brand identity, which encompasses an enriched set of platform features.

news.headline: NAMM NeXT 2025 in Nashville to unite music industry, focusing on business, tech, networking. Event website next.namm.org.
news.summary: Following the resounding success of the inaugural event this year, the 2025 Two-Day Summit is set to return with a focus on business, technology trends, networking, marketing, and entrepreneurship. The event will take place in 2025 and those interested can find more information on the NAMM NeXT website at next.namm.org. The event will be held in CARLSBAD, California and the announcement was made on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Tourmaline & Clean Energy open 2 new CNG stations in Alberta, building Canada's 1st public CNG fueling network.
news.summary: Tourmaline Oil Corp (TSX: TOU) and Clean Energy Fuels Corp (NASDAQ: CLNE) have launched two new compressed natural gas (CNG) fueling stations in Alberta, a significant step in establishing Western Canada's initial public CNG fueling network. The new stations in Calgary and Grande Prairie, combined with the Edmonton station opened in April 2023, form a pivotal part of this endeavor. These initiatives demonstrate a commitment to sustainability and reducing carbon emissions by offering cleaner fuel options to the public.

news.headline: Portoula debuts new collection of shawls & scarves in Boston on Oct. 22, 2024, made from organic cotton, wool, and silk.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Boston, the company Portoula unveiled new designs within their collection of shawls and scarves sourced from Greece. The pieces are made from high-quality organic cotton and embellished with hand-felted wool and silk.

news.headline: Carbon Ridge secures $9.5M to fast-track maritime shipping industry decarbonization efforts.
news.summary: A recent development in Los Angeles sees Carbon Ridge securing a $9.5 million investment to expedite the decarbonization efforts within the maritime shipping sector. This significant financial backing aims to propel the reduction of carbon emissions within the industry and advance sustainable practices. Known for its focus on carbon capture technology, Carbon Ridge's latest investment signals a strong push towards combating environmental issues in the maritime sector.

news.headline: Acxiom named leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack report. Key points: recognized as a leader, report by Snowflake, technologies used.
news.summary: Acxiom, a prominent player in customer intelligence and marketing solutions, has been acknowledged as a frontrunner in the Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 report by Snowflake, a leading AI Data Cloud company. The report delves into how top marketers are excelling in an evolving landscape shaped by AI, privacy, and data trends. This marks the third consecutive year of Snowflake's Modern Marketing Stack Data report, highlighting the essential technologies and platforms leveraged by marketers. Acxiom's recognition in this report underscores its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Sigma is acknowledged as a leader in Snowflake's report on Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 for thriving in the evolving digital landscape.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sigma, a data analytics solution designed for live query on cloud data, has been acknowledged as a leader in the Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 report. This report, commissioned by Snowflake, a prominent AI Data Cloud company, highlights Sigma's innovative approach to adapting to the changing landscape of digital marketing. Sigma's recognition stems from its recent introduction of the Google Analytics 4 (GA4) template. This move underscores Sigma's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements in marketing.

news.headline: Raiven Capital's Supreet Manchanda to speak at Masters and Robots 2024 conference in Warsaw for 8th year, discussing AI and Transhumanism.
news.summary: Raiven Capital is pleased to announce that Supreet Manchanda, Founding Partner, has been invited to the renowned Masters and Robots 2024 conference for the eighth year in a row. The event will take place in Warsaw and remains at the forefront of discussions on technology, Transhumanism, and the changing realm of AI. Supreet will play a pivotal role at the conference as a keynote speaker, moderator, and masterclass teacher, showcasing his expertise in these fields.

news.headline: Eight high school teams awarded $7500 grants by Lemelson-MIT to develop technological solutions for real-world problems.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, the Lemelson-MIT Program has revealed the 2024-2025 InvenTeams consisting of eight groups composed of high school students, teachers, and mentors nationwide. Each team will be granted $7,500 in funding and will benefit from year-long assistance to develop a technological creation aimed at addressing a specific issue. The projects will reflect real-life challenges noticed within their communities. The selection process for the InvenTeams was rigorous.

news.headline: Cessna Citation Ascend to be delivered with Garmin G5000 avionics in 2025, significant tech advances for pilots. #TextronAviation
news.summary: Textron Aviation has revealed that the Cessna Citation Ascend is advancing smoothly in its certification process and will feature upgrades to the Garmin G5000 avionics suite. Set to be operational by 2025, this advanced flight deck offers pilots cutting-edge technology. Manufactured by Textron Aviation Inc., a subsidiary of Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT), the Ascend program is on track for its upcoming launch.

news.headline: Corvias in Warwick delivers updated quality assurance program for military housing, improving living conditions and resident satisfaction.
news.summary: In Warwick, Rhode Island, Corvias recently introduced an improved quality assurance program for its military housing properties to enhance living standards and boost resident satisfaction. Developed in partnership with the Army, the initiative focuses on strengthening quality assurance and quality control in daily operations. The program has seen positive results, with improvements noted in work order performance and resident contentment after its implementation earlier this year.

news.headline: EROAD renews partnership with ABC Supply to boost efficiency and safety. ABC Supply - largest distributor in roofing.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in San Diego, EROAD revealed the extension of its partnership with ABC Supply Co., Inc., a key distributor of roofing and other building materials. EROAD, a prominent provider of fleet management, electronic compliance, and telematics solutions, reaffirmed its collaboration with ABC Supply Co., Inc., which stands as the leading distributor in its sector.

news.headline: Six Rubin and Rudman partners selected for 2025 Lawdragon 500 Leading Family Lawyers in America.
news.summary: In Boston on October 22, 2024, Marlee S. Cowan, Lisa M. Cukier, Susan B. Grandis, David M. Friedman, Jared D. Spinelli, and Meredith A. Stratford, who are partners at Rubin and Rudman, have been chosen to be part of the 2025 Lawdragon 500 Leading Family Lawyers in America. This prestigious recognition highlights their expertise and skills in the legal field.

news.headline: TollBit, a marketplace for AI firms and publishers, raises $24M in Series A funding led by Lightspeed.
news.summary: TollBit, a tech startup based in New York, has developed a platform that allows AI companies to compensate publishers for real-time access to necessary content. Founders Olivia Joslin and Toshit Panigrahi revealed that the company successfully secured $24 million in Series A funding, with Lightspeed leading the investment round. This influx of capital is expected to fuel TollBit's expansion and further development of its innovative solution.

news.headline: Apollo.io received Inc.'s 2024 Power Partner Award for top B2B companies catering to SMBs, helping companies grow.
news.summary: Every year, a list is compiled to honor the best B2B firms nationwide that serve small and medium-sized businesses. These companies are esteemed for their history of assisting entrepreneurs and facilitating business expansion. In an announcement made on October 22, 2024, in San Francisco, Apollo.io, a prominent sales go-to-market (GTM) platform, was duly recognized for its exemplary performance.

news.headline: Under Canvas to open first Pacific Northwest camp near Mount Hood in Washington, accepting reservations for May 2025.
news.summary: Under Canvas Columbia River Gorge, the inaugural Pacific Northwest site by the upscale outdoor hospitality leader Under Canvas, is scheduled to launch in May 2025. Reservations are currently being accepted for this new location. The announcement was made in Denver on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Coalesce named leader in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack report. Snowflake analyzed 9,800 customers, identified 10 tech categories.
news.summary: Coalesce, a data transformation company, has been recognized as an Integration and Modeling leader in the Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025 report by Snowflake. The report, based on an analysis of around 9,800 customers as of April 2024, identifies 10 technology categories used by organizations to enhance their marketing data stacks with AI. It highlights the significant impact of AI, data gravity, and privacy in the marketing technology landscape, showcasing a shift from previous years. This emphasizes the importance for marketers to adapt and leverage AI technologies to better serve customers and convert prospects.

news.headline: Kenneth Plaks to chair event recognizing X-62A VISTA aircraft testing AI algorithms to take place on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: A discussion on key flight test accomplishments for the X-62A VISTA, a unique aircraft adapted for testing AI algorithms, will be the main attraction at an event in EDWARDS, Calif. The presentation is scheduled for October 22, 2024. The Flight Test Historical Foundation, a nonprofit organization focused on constructing the most thorough...

news.headline: Gentuity® HF-OCT Imaging System receives FDA 510(k) clearance for pre- and post-coronary intervention imaging, serving with world's smallest imaging catheter, as of Oct 22, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Sudbury, Massachusetts called Gentuity, LLC, known for their advanced intravascular imaging technologies, has received FDA clearance for their innovative imaging catheter, which is touted as the world's smallest. This technology can now be used for pre- and post-intervention purposes. This news was announced on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: IACMI partners with Mississippi State University and Penn State Behrend to establish machining training centers, aiming to revitalize American manufacturing.
news.summary: Two new ACE hubs have been established in Knoxville, Tennessee as per the news released on October 22, 2024. The Institute for Advanced Composites Manufacturing Innovation® (IACMI) revealed these partnerships with Mississippi State University located in Starkville, MS, and Penn State Behrend. The goal behind these collaborations is to revitalize American manufacturing.

news.headline: ixEngage by ixlayer now offers at-home CBC tests for direct-to-patient biopharma programs, aiding in diagnosing 100s of conditions.
news.summary: ixEngage is revolutionizing healthcare by expediting pre-treatment and routine complete blood count (CBC) tests for over 200 conditions, such as asthma, heart disease, and kidney disease. This development is crucial in enhancing access to care for patients. The company, based in San Francisco, made this announcement on October 22, 2024.ixEngage's efforts will benefit countless individuals seeking medical assistance.

news.headline: Unisys (NYSE: UIS) to join EDUCAUSE Annual Conference 2024 in San Antonio, TX from Oct. 21-24, uniting higher ed tech leaders.
news.summary: A company based in Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, Unisys (NYSE: UIS), has shared thrilling news about its involvement in the EDUCAUSE Annual Conference 2024 in San Antonio, Texas. The conference, running from October 21 to 24, serves as a significant gathering for executives in higher education technology.

news.headline: Census honored as Customer Data Platform leader by Snowflake. Named Marketing Application Data Cloud Product Partner of the Year 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Census was recently honored as a top Customer Data Platform leader in the Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025. The recognition was announced by Snowflake, a leading AI Data Cloud company. This acknowledgment comes after Census was named Snowflake's Marketing Application Data Cloud Product Partner of the Year for 2024 at the Snowflake Summit earlier this year. Notably, in the last year, more than 130 customers have benefited from the collaboration between Census and Snowflake.

news.headline: Ketch recognized as 'One to Watch' by Snowflake in Consent Management category in Modern Marketing Data Stack Report.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Ketch, a Data Permissioning Platform focusing on privacy-safe and consumer-centric data activation, was recently acknowledged as a noteworthy player in the Consent Management sector. The recognition came from Snowflake, a prominent AI Data Cloud company, within their latest report titled The Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025. This annual report showcases leading marketers who are excelling in a landscape reshaped by AI, privacy concerns, and data gravitation. Ketch's recognition underlines its commitment to empowering data protection and consumer-centric approaches. Snowflake's report sheds light on emerging trends and strategies in marketing data management for the future.

news.headline: MetroList introduces voice-activated property add-edit feature, simplifying workflow for real estate professionals.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, a recent development has been announced that offers a new capability designed to streamline processes for real estate professionals. This innovation aims to simplify workflows and enhance efficiency in the industry. With a focus on increasing productivity and effectiveness, this advancement is set to significantly impact real estate professionals by providing them with a more streamlined approach to their work.

news.headline: Snowplow named leader in Analytics & Data Capture in Snowflake's "Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025" report.
news.summary: In Boston, Snowplow has gained recognition as a Leader in the Analytics & Data Capture sector in Snowflake's "Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025" report. This acknowledgment solidifies Snowplow's standing within the industry and highlights its expertise in this field. The report sheds light on Snowplow's exceptional performance and places them at the forefront of companies excelling in the specified category. This achievement underscores Snowplow's commitment to innovation and signifies its growing influence within the competitive market.

news.headline: UiPath introduces new vision of agentic automation in New York & Las Vegas, including Agent Builder.
news.summary: UiPath has revealed its new strategic focus in New York and Las Vegas, outlining a vision centered on agentic automation. The company introduced a glimpse of Agent Builder™ as part of this direction.

news.headline: UiPath partners with Inflection AI to integrate platforms for security industries, enhancing agentic AI capabilities.
news.summary: UiPath has unveiled a strategic collaboration with Inflection AI to merge the UiPath Platform with the pioneering Inflection for Enterprise solution. This partnership signifies a vital step in advancing automation technology, as it combines UiPath's robust automation capabilities with the cutting-edge features of Inflection AI's Enterprise solution. This collaboration is poised to revolutionize the automation landscape, offering businesses unparalleled efficiency and innovation. With this integration, organizations can harness the power of automation to drive performance and productivity.

news.headline: Hesperos, Inc. appoints Lawrence Florin as CEO, bringing over 20 years of industry experience. #Biotech #DrugDevelopment
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Hesperos, Inc. has appointed Lawrence (Larry) Florin as their new Chief Executive Officer. With more than 20 years of experience in bio/clinical technology, Mr. Florin is known for his expertise in clinical development, business expansion, and strategic advancements. His previous role involved serving as Chief Clinical Officer. Hesperos specializes in replicating human biology for drug development through its innovative Human-on-a-Chip® technology. This move signifies a strategic shift for the company, leveraging Mr. Florin's extensive experience to drive growth and innovation.

news.headline: MessageGears is recognized as "One to Watch" in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack report – Atlanta-based company gains recognition.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company, MessageGears, has been recognized as a standout in Snowflake's Modern Marketing Data Stack report. Snowflake designated MessageGears as "one to watch" in the report. This acknowledgment highlights MessageGears' significance in the modern marketing landscape.

news.headline: IMF boosts US growth forecast for 2024 to 2.8%, warns on rising national debt and deficits. Fed policy changes crucial.
news.summary: The IMF's latest World Economic Outlook report presents a mixed view of the U.S. economy. While predicting a 2.8% growth for 2024 (up from 2.6%), driven by strong consumer spending and robust business investment, the IMF is concerned about the growing public debt. The U.S. public debt is expected to rise significantly due to persistent deficits and increasing debt-servicing costs. The Federal Reserve's easing policy in September 2024, with a 50 basis point cut, is highlighted as a key factor in the revised economic outlook. The report emphasizes the importance of addressing long-term fiscal risks despite short-term growth projections.

news.headline: QNB Corp. reports Q3 2024 net income of $3.34M, up from $2.34M in 2023. Nine-month net income in 2024 was $8.39M.
news.summary: In Quakertown, Pennsylvania, on October 22, 2024, QNB Corp announced its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The parent company of QNB Bank reported a net income of $3,338,000, translating to $0.91 per diluted share, a significant increase from the $2,344,000 net income, or $0.65 per share, from the third quarter of 2023. For the nine months ending on September 30, 2024, QNB disclosed a net income of $8,397,000, or $2.29 per diluted share. This performance slightly outperformed the results from the same period in 2023, where the net income was $8,349,000, or $2.32 per share on a diluted basis.

news.headline: DeepComputing and Andes Technology partner to develop world's first RISC-V AI PC with 7nm QiLai SoC, featuring Ubuntu Desktop.
news.summary: In San Jose, California on October 22, 2024, DeepComputing revealed a new partnership with Andes Technology Corporation, an established company in 32/64-bit RISC-V processor cores. The collaboration aims to create the world's inaugural RISC-V AI PC utilizing Andes' 7nm QiLai SoC. This innovative PC will feature Ubuntu Desktop and seek to revolutionize AI computing with its cutting-edge hardware and software tailored for RISC-V technology.

news.headline: Starboard criticizes Pfizer execs for not delivering on promised 'best pipeline' in a recent blow.
news.summary: On Tuesday, Starboard criticized Pfizer, stating that the company did not meet expectations regarding what they referred to as the "top pipeline" in history. Starboard criticized Pfizer executives for their failure to fulfill promises related to the pipeline. The news was covered by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Moderna stock dropped post 2025 sales outlook and 2027 R&D budget cut. Is MRNA stock a sell?
news.summary: Following a slight 2025 sales forecast and reduction in the 2027 R&D budget, Moderna's stocks experienced a sharp decline. Investors are questioning whether it is wise to sell MRNA stock at this point.

news.headline: PURE Bioscience partners with Madison Chemical Co., Inc. to distribute SDC products under a multi-year agreement.
news.summary: In El Cajon, California, PURE Bioscience, Inc. (OTCQB: PURE) has announced a significant partnership with Madison Chemical Co., Inc. for the distribution of its innovative silver dihydrogen citrate (SDC) antimicrobial products. The multi-year agreement includes special terms and conditions for the purchase and sale of SDC products. This collaboration marks a strategic move for PURE, as they join forces with Madison Chemical, a renowned industry leader.
